headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CRL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Charles River Laboratories trades at $225.41 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 11.4% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 9.3%.
